{"action":"created","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/53702","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/53702/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/53702/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/53702/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/53702","id":2180994127,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6B_1RP","number":53702,"title":"Paths from Base reported in `StackFrame` and `MethodInstance` differ","user":{"login":"Seelengrab","id":11753998,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjExNzUzOTk4","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/11753998?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab","html_url":"https://github.com/Seelengrab","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Seelengrab/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":3,"created_at":"2024-03-12T08:17:30Z","updated_at":"2024-11-19T19:04:29Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","sub_issues_summary":{"total":0,"completed":0,"percent_completed":0},"active_lock_reason":null,"body":"MWE:

```julia
julia> f() = error("boo")
f (generic function with 1 method)

julia> g() = try
           @noinline f()
       catch e
           stacktrace(Base.catch_backtrace())
       end
g (generic function with 1 method)

julia> trace = g();

julia> trace[1].file
Symbol("./error.jl")

julia> getproperty.(methods(error), :file)
2-element Vector{Symbol}:
 Symbol("error.jl")
 Symbol("error.jl")
```

This is quite annoying when trying to investigate which file an error in a backtrace actually came from and whether that error corresponds to a specific location, particularly because these are `Symbol` and not `String`. I'm assuming it's only Base that has this difference, though I admittedly haven't checked.

I can work around this for now at the cost of allocating strings and using `endswith`, but it's not ideal since those allocations cause quite a large slowdown for Supposition.jl.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/53702/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/53702/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2486518432","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/53702#issuecomment-2486518432","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/53702","id":2486518432,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABkWpM6UNUKg","user":{"login":"benninkrs","id":22162695,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjIyMTYyNjk1","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/22162695?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs","html_url":"https://github.com/benninkrs","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/benninkrs/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-11-19T19:04:27Z","updated_at":"2024-11-19T19:04:27Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"This is also an inconvenience in vscode.  As discussed in [julia-vscode issue 3736](https://github.com/julia-vscode/julia-vscode/issues/3736), the output of `methods` (and related functions) results unresponsive hyperlinks in the REPL, whereas the hyperlinks from stack traces work fine.  Making the output `methods` (and related functions) have the same format as that of stack trace outputs would presumably fix this problem.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2486518432/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
